title: jasminum sambac var. normale
intro: Jasminum sambac var. normale, also known as the Arabian jasmine or motia, is a fragrant and ornamental flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum sambac var. normale include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to make perfumes, aromatherapy products, and traditional remedies.
